note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for what generated creative is allowed to depict. Generated media must show THIS product — never a random/generic supplement, stock bottle, unrelated gummies or competitor packaging. Update `approved_reference_assets` as real pack shots land on the website; keep `approved_for_generation` accurate.

visual_spec.packaging_type: matte white plastic jar with wrap-around label
visual_spec.logo_usage: PureLife Nutra wordmark exactly as supplied — never redrawn, restyled or approximated by the model
visual_spec.flavour: TODO_VERIFY — confirm flavour before any flavour-specific creative
visual_spec.serving_visual_rules: Gummies shown loose in hand, on a plate/counter, or beside the open jar. Never show swallowing close-ups framed as instant effect, never medical framing, never pills or powder.

reference_asset_contract.note: Each entry: { id, url, role (hero|label|lifestyle|gummy-macro), angle, background_notes, approved_for_generation: true|false, last_reviewed: YYYY-MM-DD }. Only entries with approved_for_generation:true are ever passed to generation providers.
allowed_sources: founder-supplied media URLs added to approved_reference_assets

forbidden_visual_substitutes: powder tubs or pill bottles standing in for the gummies

tiktok_shop.note: TikTok Shop UK listing requires category approval + document checks. Until approved:true, all paid/organic traffic routes to the DTC website PDP.
